# seerr_issues (Data Source)

Get information about all existing Seerr issues.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_issues" "all" {}

output "total_issues" {
  value = length(data.seerr_issues.all.issues)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `issues` (Attributes List) List of issues. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--issues))

<a id="nestedatt--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `issues`

Read-Only:

- `created_by_id` (Number) The ID of the user who created the issue.
- `id` (String) The ID of the issue.
- `issue_type` (Number) The type of the issue (1: Video, 2: Audio, 3: Subtitle, 4: Other, 5: Unknown).
- `media_id` (Number) The ID of the media associated with the issue.
- `status` (Number) The status of the issue (1: Open, 2: Resolved).
